mapper.select: SELECT r.review_id, r.writer_id, u.nickname, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.writer_id=u.user_id WHERE r.meeting_id=#{meetingId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews( meeting_id, writer_id, rating, content ) VALUES( #{meetingId}, #{writerId}, #{rating}, #{content} )
